extortion.description: We respect and/or protect:      fair trade     accurate records, reports and documentation     timely, appropriate, and fair disclosure     intellectual property     personal data, and confidential information     whistle-blowing     security export control   We do not allow for:      anticompetitive behaviors, such as cartels     corruptions such as bribery     insider trading and market manipulation     money laundering and terrorism financing     dealing with antisocial forces
